{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Alliance Station One-Ten
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Alliance Station One-Ten]] is a refueling station for [[Queen Shyrax]]'s fleet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
